results.title: Best Lattice Alternatives in 2026 (Ranked & Compared)
results.content:
## #What is the best Lattice alternative?

The best Lattice alternative for most small and mid-sized teams is FeedbackPulse. It bundles performance reviews, 360 feedback, engagement surveys, and pulse checks into one base plan, with no minimum seat count and a free tier for up to 10 people. Based on the pricing comparison below, switching from Lattice cuts annual cost by roughly 73%, about $3,300 a year at 25 employees. The other 10 options ranked here fit narrower needs, from manager-led check-ins to enterprise analytics. [...] ## #Top Alternatives to Lattice

If you're looking for alternatives to Lattice, here are eleven excellent options, starting with FeedbackPulse.

### #1. FeedbackPulse

FeedbackPulse was built specifically for the gap that Lattice leaves open: teams that need professional-grade performance and engagement tools without the enterprise pricing model. It's especially well suited to hybrid and remote teams that want a modern, lightweight employee listening tool without adding process overhead.

Key Features:

What's different from Lattice:

Pricing: Free for up to 10 users. Pro plan starts at $5/user/month (billed monthly) or $4/user/month (billed annually).

### #2. 15Five [...] What is the most affordable Lattice alternative?

FeedbackPulse is the most affordable Lattice alternative, with a free tier for teams up to 10 and a Pro plan at $4/employee/month, compared to Lattice which starts at $11/user/month with a 25-seat minimum ($3,300/year minimum). Engagedly is another option for teams that want performance reviews, engagement, recognition, and learning in one platform.

Why are companies looking for Lattice alternatives?

results.title: 7 Best Lattice Alternatives for Performance That Actually Changes [2026]
results.content:
## The Real Question: Do You Need Better Measurement or Better Behavior Change?

Most Lattice alternatives are variations of the same approach: measure performance, track goals, survey engagement, run reviews. They differ in execution quality, pricing, feature breadth, and user experience. But they share the same fundamental assumption – that if you measure performance well enough, performance will improve.

For some organizations, that assumption holds. Good measurement does help, especially if the previous system was fragmented or poorly adopted. [...] ## What to Consider Before Switching From Lattice

Before evaluating alternatives, clarify the actual problem:

If your problem is “reviews are clunky” – you need a better performance management tool. Look at Leapsome or PerformYard.

If your problem is “we measure engagement but nothing changes” – you need a behavioral change tool. That’s a fundamentally different category from performance management.

If your problem is “managers need coaching” – you need a coaching platform like BetterUp or a behavioral enablement tool that works at the manager level.

If your problem is “too many HR tools” – you need consolidation. Look at BambooHR or Leapsome. [...] ### What It Does

PerformYard strips performance management down to the essentials: customizable review cycles, goal tracking, continuous feedback, and reporting. It doesn’t try to be an HRIS or engagement platform. It does one thing and does it efficiently.

### How It Compares to Lattice

PerformYard is leaner and often more affordable than Lattice. If your complaint with Lattice is complexity or feature bloat, PerformYard offers a focused alternative. It’s particularly popular with mid-market companies (200-2,000 employees) that don’t need Lattice’s full suite.

### Pricing

Starts at $5/user/month for performance management. Employee engagement add-on available separately.

### Limitation

results.title: 6 Best Lattice Alternatives · Small Improvements
results.content:
TL;DR: the best Lattice alternatives at a glance

Don’t have time to read the whole guide? Here is the quick breakdown of the best alternatives based on your company’s needs:

1. Small Improvements: Best for simplicity and startups
2. Taito.ai: Best for continuous feedback and 1:1-driven teams
3. FeedbackPulse: Best for lightweight eNPS and pulse employee surveys
4. ThriveSparrow: Best for aligning company goals with individual growth goals
5. Pensero: Best for engineering organizations that want performance insights tied to software delivery data
6. BambooHR: Best if you want an all-in-one HRIS

Prefer watching instead? We also made a short video walkthrough of the 6 best Lattice alternatives, covering where each tool fits best and what type of team should consider it. [...] You can also watch the full 6 best Lattice alternatives video on YouTube.

What is Lattice?

Lattice is a widely used performance management platform designed to help companies run structured performance reviews, track goals (OKRs), gather engagement feedback, and manage development conversations. It’s a robust system, usually favored by mid-sized to larger organizations that want to centralize their people processes.

However, all these capabilities mean more setup, heavier configuration, and continuous administration. When a platform’s structure or cost no longer aligns with a team’s reality, they look for alternatives.

Common reasons teams switch from Lattice: [...] Selecting a Lattice alternative comes down to one question: where is your team today? A tool that works for a 5,000-person corporation often creates unnecessary friction for a team of 150. Over-engineering your performance process is the fastest way to lose manager buy-in and employee adoption.

If you need deep data science and global benchmarks, Culture Amp is a logical choice. If you want a platform that scales with a complex tech stack, Leapsome fits well.

But if you’ve realized that Lattice is too heavy for your workflows and you want to get back to meaningful conversations without the administrative burden, Small Improvements is built for exactly that. We focus on keeping feedback simple, flexible, and high-impact.

by Bart Stemkens

results.title: Lattice Alternatives 2026: 10 Better Options for Scaling Teams
results.content:
## Top 10 Lattice alternatives

Below are ten alternatives organizations evaluate when Lattice no longer matches their structural or workflow needs.

## 1. Peoplebox.ai

### Overview

Peoplebox.ai is an all-in-one talent management platform built for scaling organizations that need deeper alignment between goals, performance reviews, calibration, engagement, and compensation.

It is typically chosen by teams that have outgrown rigid HRIS performance modules or spreadsheet-heavy processes and want configurable workflows without moving to heavyweight enterprise software.

### Notable Features [...] ### Pricing

 Around $15/user/month

## 9. Engagedly

Engagedly is also one of the top Lattice alternatives your business can look into during the research process. This OKR tool focuses on people and strategy. It has a People Success Model which aims at bridging the gap between people and strategy. It has designed a 3 pillar framework for aligning organizational strategy with people strategy. Executing performance, enabling development, and engaging people are key focus areas that are combined to bring overall organizational efficiency.

### Notable features [...] Pricing by quote / varies by modules

## 5. Weekdone

Another OKR and performance management platform that your organization can consider as a Lattice alternative is Weekdone. This productivity tool helps you set company goals, align and manage teams. You even get to track individual performances based on how each member progresses during their tasks. On top of that, you get to improve communication in the organization as it helps members across different departments to collaborate in one place seamlessly. Weekdone is also efficient in tracking OKRs and providing feedback.

### Notable Features
